item.title: 长鑫存储4.3亿美元IPO助力中国HBM挑战全球存储巨头
item.summary: CXMT is preparing China's largest chip-sector IPO of 2026, seeking up to US$4.3 billion to expand DRAM and HBM capacity, deepen vertical integration, and challenge Samsung Electronics, SK Hynix, and Micron Technology under rising AI demand and tighter US export controls.
